title: Cartoon PVP Sounds
description: Turn PvP into a Tom and Jerry episode!
body:
Sometimes PvP gets intense. This pack makes it hilarious instead. 

It replaces explosions and damage, with classical sound effects you may have heard in old cartoons. These include, bonks, bites, dashes, whooshes, and more!


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2xtup8nJ2gU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
